full_text:
Zhu Gui (Yuanling)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Gui, styledYuanling, was born in Hanzhong. Travelled across the north to study at the age of 15, compiled a collection of biographies of local worthies. Zhu Gui was affiliated with Liu Yan.
